catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for INSITU_GLO_PHY_UV_DISCRETE_NRT_013_048, detailing the near real-time UV product from MERCATOR OCEAN INTERNATIONAL under the EU Copernicus Marine Service.
